hierarchy.h1: text-4xl md:text-5xl lg:text-6xl uppercase tracking-tighter font-black
hierarchy.h2: text-2xl md:text-3xl lg:text-4xl uppercase tracking-tight font-bold
hierarchy.label: text-xs tracking-[0.2em] uppercase text-[#525252]
hierarchy.metric: text-4xl md:text-5xl font-mono font-bold tracking-tighter text-white

grid_system.description: Dense, data-correlation, scanability. Base grid cols 1 (mobile), md:cols-3, lg:cols-4. Tight gaps (gap-4 or gap-6). Use h-full on children to stretch.

layouts.alignment: Left-aligned for data and labels. Optical alignment for icons. Avoid symmetry, create tension through layout.

cards.style: Flat background (#141414), 1px solid border (rgba(255,255,255,0.1)), no shadow by default. Hover state: subtle lift (-translate-y-1) and primary color border glow.
cards.radius: rounded-none or max rounded-sm (2px) for tactical feel.

buttons.primary: bg-[#CCFF00] text-black font-bold uppercase tracking-widest hover:bg-[#E6FF66] focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#CCFF00]/50 transition-colors rounded-none
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-white/20 text-white hover:bg-white/5 hover:text-white rounded-none uppercase tracking-widest text-sm

badges.risk_high: bg-[#FF3B30]/10 text-[#FF3B30] border border-[#FF3B30]/20 rounded-none uppercase text-xs tracking-wider px-2 py-1
badges.risk_medium: bg-[#FFEA00]/10 text-[#FFEA00] border border-[#FFEA00]/20 rounded-none uppercase text-xs tracking-wider px-2 py-1
badges.risk_low: bg-[#00E676]/10 text-[#00E676] border border-[#00E676]/20 rounded-none uppercase text-xs tracking-wider px-2 py-1

charts.guidelines: Use monochromatic or high-contrast lines against dark background. Use #CCFF00 for primary metric (e.g. ACWR), #FFFFFF for Acute Load, and #A3A3A3 for Chronic Load.

empty_states.team_data: If no team data inserted, show a centered bold text 'Insira dados da equipa' with a call-to-action button to add data.
empty_states.acwr_data: If days since first training < 28, show blurred chart or empty state card with 'Dados Insuficientes'.

motion.page_transition: framer-motion fade in and slight slide up (y: 20 -> 0)

image_urls.description: Blurred action shot of futsal players to use as a low-opacity background behind auth/login screen
Futsal ball on court for the login split screen

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement a deep dark mode dashboard for Futsal Workload Monitoring. Base background is #0A0A0A (Performance Pro archetype).
Data visualization is core: integrate 'recharts' for ACWR, Acute vs Chronic load, Monotony, and Strain.

ACWR Business Logic: Calculate Acute (7 days rolling sum) and Chronic (28 days rolling avg of acute). ACWR = Acute / Chronic. If less than 28 days of data, display 'Dados Insuficientes' badge and block the ACWR chart.
Empty State: If no team configured, show 'Insira dados da equipa' in the Team Profile / Overview sections.
Team Profile Fields: Name, Escalão (Category), Época (Season).
Athlete Logging: Form needs Date, RPE (1-10), Duration (mins), Sleep Quality (1-5 or 1-10). Calculate Load = RPE * Duration.
Athlete Comparison: Build a side-by-side view (grid-cols-2) comparing two selected athletes' metrics and charts.
Monthly Summary: Generate a view/component summarizing average training load and sleep quality per athlete for the month, showing physical condition evolution.
Use Phosphor Icons for the technical, bold look suitable for a sports dashboard.
All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute.
Avoid standard Shadcn rounded cards. Override Shadcn to use flat cards (bg-[#141414], border border-white/10, rounded-none).
